description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Nightly Build that runs on a schedule, on push to main, on pull requests to main, and manually. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on an amazonlinux:2023 container, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and builds FBGEMM_GPU Nightly (CPU version) for Python 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10. The test_and_publish_artifact job downloads the built artifact, tests it on GPU, and pushes it to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
